scan_method: Per-character PNG inventory using the agent's actual discover_render_set scope (root + angles, expressions, poses, closeups, outfits, source_refs, kontext_sheets, midjourney_refs). PNG counts in `agent_scan_*` reflect what muscle_character_build_agent.py would count after the ANIM-07 extension and reproduce the per-character render_count values in apex/docs/anim/ANIM-03-reference-pack-manifest.json. The `out_of_scan_universe` block records PNGs that exist on disk but are NOT in the agent's scan universe (e.g. video_frames/) — recorded for operator transparency only, not for the manifest's render_count.
scan_method_provenance: Counts taken from filesystem directly via path-bound find at the timestamp above; verified against muscle_character_build_agent.py --dry-run outputs (jesse=0, grog=45, lirian=18, amy=52) for the four characters whose counts the agent reports. This file was authored AFTER the agent extension and after the final grog+lirian builds completed at 2026-06-07T08:44:46Z and 08:44:47Z respectively (commit efcc25d, regenerated via --phase ANIM-07 --force after Codex round-3 caught the bible-phase-label drift); it is a post-build coverage census, not a pre-flight snapshot. The 07:04:45Z timestamp in the filename is preserved as the file's original authoring time only — generated_at below is the truthful current value.
cast_canon_count_note: PROJECT_SPEC.md lines 125-132 enumerate 8 named characters in §1.8. Emma is in the canon table (line 127) but has no status.json on disk, which is why her ANIM-03 manifest entry sets status_json_path=null and emits F-ANIM03-02; canon-named is determined by §1.8 presence, not by status.json presence. Galinda is the only render-tree resident NOT in §1.8 and is built from her status.json.
missing_artifacts_queue_note: The single unified governance queue file at apex_governance/MISSING_SECRETS.queue.json holds both MS-* secrets and MA-* missing-artifacts rows (see MA-AGEN-001..004 and MA-ANIM-001 already present). SPEC-ANIM-07 §3/§7 references to a 'MISSING_ARTIFACTS.queue.json' name resolve to this unified file in practice; no separate file exists. MA-ANIM-07-RENDERS-EMPTY + MA-ANIM-07-MIDJOURNEY-RAW already appended (verified at 2026-06-07T07:05Z).

census.note: 52 PNGs counted by the agent under midjourney_refs/. The pick_pack picker anti-matches /midjourney_refs/ so none can satisfy role needles; the 52 contribute to render_count provenance only.

video_frames/ holds 1 PNG that the agent does NOT scan (no entry in discover_render_set's sub-dir list). It is recorded under out_of_scan_universe for operator transparency and does NOT contribute to the manifest's render_count=45.

agent_extension_required: discover_render_set: add 'kontext_sheets' and 'midjourney_refs' to the nested-subdir list (kontext for pack-eligible picks; midjourney for render_count provenance only).
PACK_ROLES: add kontext_sheets-specific needles (turnaround_seed, expression_happy/angry/sad, pose_action, pose_idle) at the tail of the list so legacy ANIM-03 picks still win first.
pick_pack: universally exclude /midjourney_refs/ paths so UUID filenames cannot satisfy needle matches.
Root-level discover for lirian's lirian_candidate_seed*.png is already covered by the existing root *.png glob; add '_candidate_seed' needle to primary_ref.
notes: agent_scan_breakdown columns sum to agent_scan_png_count by construction; both reproduce the agent's --dry-run render_count values reported in the per-character bibles and ANIM-03-reference-pack-manifest.json entries.

PROJECT_SPEC §1.8 canon at jesse_animate/PROJECT_SPEC.md lines 125-132 lists 8 named characters (jesse, kevin, emma, amy, laura, grog, lirian, ann). Galinda is the only render-tree resident NOT in §1.8 and was built in ANIM-03 from her status.json. Emma is in §1.8 (line 127) but has no status.json on disk; her ANIM-03 manifest entry sets status_json_path=null accordingly.

video_frames/ for grog is recorded under out_of_scan_universe because the agent does not scan it; it is video extraction artifact, not a reference render, and the operator has not requested its inclusion in the agent's universe.

Two operator-actionable blockers raised at MA-ANIM-07-RENDERS-EMPTY (4 chars) and MA-ANIM-07-MIDJOURNEY-RAW (1 char) in apex_governance/MISSING_SECRETS.queue.json (the unified governance queue holding both MS-* and MA-* rows).
